news.t: Matthews Appoints Tiffany Hsiao as Portfolio Manager of the Matthews China Small Companies and Matthews Asia Innovators Strategies
Matthews Asia Launches First Active ETF Strategies to Meet Growing Client Need

holdings.infoBox: MINV is an equity ETF with a total of 72 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 6.74%, Samsung Electronics at 5.26%, SK hynix at 5.00%, CASH AND OTHERS at 4.43%, and Delta Electronics at 3.28%.

overview.description: The Matthews Asia Innovators Active ETF (MINV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to hold stocks of innovative companies in Asia. Holdings are fundamentally screened for sustainable growth. MINV was launched on Jul 13, 2022 and is issued by Matthews.

data.title: Matthews Asia Launches First Active ETF Strategies to Meet Growing Client Need
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Matthews Asia launched three active exchange traded funds (ETFs) on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) today that focus on global emerging markets, Asia and China. The ...
